verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. These lipid modifications attach it to the cytoplasmic face of the PM, not the extracellular face. Its catalytic and SH2/SH3 domains are entirely cytoplasmic. It has no transmembrane domain, no GPI anchor, and no extracellular domain. It is not co-trafficked as part of a stable surface-exposed complex. There is no documented surface exposure on the outer leaflet accessible to extracellular binders.
